    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="en">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>JOMAYALE — Business Tracker</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
    <style>
    :root{
    --ink:#14261f; --paper:#f7f4ec; --card:#ffffff; --line:#e2ddcf;
    --brand:#0f5132; --brand2:#1a7a4c; --gold:#b8862f; --danger:#b3261e;
    --muted:#6b6b5e; --soft:#eef4ef; --shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(20,38,31,.08);
    }
    *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
    body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",Roboto,sans-serif;
    background:var(--paper);color:var(--ink);line-height:1.5;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}
    .hidden{display:none!important}
    button{font-family:inherit;cursor:pointer;border:none;font-size:16px}
    input,select{font-family:inherit;font-size:16px}
    #loginView{min-height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:24px;
    background:linear-gradient(160deg,#0f5132,#14261f)}
    .loginCard{background:var(--card);border-radius:20px;padding:32px 26px;width:100%;max-width:380px;box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.25)}
    .logo{width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:16px;background:var(--brand);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    margin:0 auto 14px;color:#fff;font-weight:800;font-size:26px;letter-spacing:.5px}
    .loginCard h1{text-align:center;font-size:22px;margin-bottom:2px}
    .loginCard .sub{text-align:center;color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;margin-bottom:22px}
    label{display:block;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted);margin:14px 0 5px}
    .field{width:100%;padding:13px 14px;border:1.5px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;background:#fbfaf6}
    .field:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--brand2)}
    .btn{width:100%;padding:14px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--brand);color:#fff;font-weight:700;margin-top:20px;transition:.15s}
    .btn:hover{background:var(--brand2)}
    .btn.ghost{background:transparent;color:var(--brand);border:1.5px solid var(--line)}
    .btn.small{width:auto;padding:8px 14px;font-size:13px;margin-top:0}
    .err{color:var(--danger);font-size:13px;text-align:center;margin-top:12px;min-height:18px}
    .pinHint{background:var(--soft);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px;font-size:12.5px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:18px}
    .pinHint b{color:var(--ink)}
    #appView{min-height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;max-width:660px;margin:0 auto;background:var(--paper)}
    .topbar{background:var(--brand);color:#fff;padding:14px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:5}
    .topbar .who{font-size:13px;opacity:.9} .topbar .who b{display:block;font-size:15px;opacity:1}
    .topbar button{background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);color:#fff;border-radius:9px;padding:8px 12px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600}
    .tabs{display:flex;background:var(--card);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);position:sticky;top:52px;z-index:4;overflow-x:auto}
    .tabs button{flex:0 0 auto;padding:13px 14px;background:none;color:var(--muted);font-weight:600;font-size:12.5px;border-bottom:3px solid transparent;white-space:nowrap}
    .tabs button.active{color:var(--brand);border-bottom-color:var(--brand)}
    .page{padding:18px;flex:1}
    .card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:16px;padding:18px;margin-bottom:16px;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
    .card h2{font-size:16px;margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
    .row{display:flex;gap:10px} .row>*{flex:1}
    .statGrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px}
    .stat{background:var(--soft);border-radius:14px;padding:14px}
    .stat .lbl{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:600}
    .stat .val{font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:var(--brand);margin-top:3px}
    .listItem{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:11px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--line);font-size:14px}
    .listItem:first-of-type{border-top:none}
    .pill{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:20px;display:inline-block}
    .pill.owner{background:#e7f0ea;color:var(--brand)} .pill.staff{background:#fbf1dc;color:var(--gold)}
    .pill.low{background:#fbe3e1;color:var(--danger)} .pill.ok{background:#e7f0ea;color:var(--brand)}
    .pill.truck{background:#e6eefb;color:#26518c}
    .muted{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px}
    .empty{text-align:center;color:var(--muted);padding:26px 10px;font-size:14px}
    .amount{font-weight:800;color:var(--brand)}
    .logRow{padding:10px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--line);font-size:13px}
    .logRow:first-child{border-top:none}
    .logRow .t{color:var(--muted);font-size:12px}
    .toast{position:fixed;bottom:22px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:var(--ink);color:#fff;
    padding:12px 20px;border-radius:12px;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.3);z-index:20;opacity:0;transition:.25s;pointer-events:none}
    .toast.show{opacity:1;bottom:30px}
    .addBtn{width:100%;padding:13px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--brand);color:#fff;font-weight:700;margin-top:6px}
    .divider{height:1px;background:var(--line);margin:14px 0}
    .warn{background:#fff8ec;border:1px solid #f0dcae;border-radius:12px;padding:12px 14px;font-size:13px;color:#7a5b16;margin-bottom:14px}
    .crew{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:3px;line-height:1.7}
    .crew b{color:var(--ink)}
    .agentBlock{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:12px;background:#fcfbf7}
    .agentBlock .head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px}
    .agentBlock .head .nm{font-weight:700}
    .segbtn{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px}
    .segbtn button{flex:1;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;border:1.5px solid var(--line);background:#fff;color:var(--muted);font-weight:600;font-size:13px}
    .segbtn button.on{background:var(--brand);color:#fff;border-color:var(--brand)}
    .subline{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted)}
    .promoBanner{background:#fff4e0;border:1px solid #f0cf8f;border-radius:12px;padding:11px 13px;margin:10px 0 4px;font-size:13px;color:#7a5b16}
    .promoBanner b{color:#5c440f}
    .promoTag{background:#fff4e0;color:#8a6516;border:1px solid #f0cf8f}
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <div id="loginView">
    <div class="loginCard">
    <div class="logo">JM</div>
    <h1>JOMAYALE</h1>
    <div class="sub">Beverage Distribution · Sibulan</div>
    <label for="userSelect">Who is logging in?</label>
    <select id="userSelect" class="field"></select>
    <label for="pinInput">Enter your PIN</label>
    <input id="pinInput" class="field" type="password" inputmode="numeric" placeholder="••••" maxlength="6" autocomplete="off">
    <button class="btn" onclick="doLogin()">Log in</button>
    <div class="err" id="loginErr"></div>
    <div class="pinHint">
    <b>Accounts:</b><br>
    Owner - Kap Janz &nbsp;· PIN <b>1111</b><br>
    Cashier - Jocelyn &nbsp;· PIN <b>2222</b>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="appView" class="hidden">
    <div class="topbar">
    <div class="who">Logged in as<b id="currentName">—</b></div>
    <button onclick="doLogout()">Log out</button>
    </div>
    <div class="tabs">
    <button data-tab="home" class="active" onclick="switchTab('home')">Home</button>
    <button data-tab="sales" onclick="switchTab('sales')">Sales</button>
    <button data-tab="mysales" id="mySalesTab" onclick="switchTab('mysales')" style="display:none">My Sales</button>
    <button data-tab="agents" onclick="switchTab('agents')">Agents</button>
    <button data-tab="collect" id="collectTab" onclick="switchTab('collect')">Collectibles</button>
    <button data-tab="loading" id="loadingTab" onclick="switchTab('loading')">Loading</button>
    <button data-tab="stock" onclick="switchTab('stock')">Stock</button>
    <button data-tab="promos" onclick="switchTab('promos')">Promos</button>
    <button data-tab="log" onclick="switchTab('log')">Activity</button>
    <button data-tab="trucks" id="trucksTab" onclick="switchTab('trucks')">Trucks</button>
    <button data-tab="people" id="peopleTab" onclick="switchTab('people')">People</button>
    </div>
    <div class="page" id="page-home">
    <div class="card">
    <h2>Today at a glance</h2>
    <div class="statGrid">
    <div class="stat"><div class="lbl">Sales today (₱)</div><div class="val" id="statSales">0</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="lbl">Transactions</div><div class="val" id="statTxns">0</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="lbl">Walk-in sales (₱)</div><div class="val" id="statWalk">0</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="lbl">Products low</div><div class="val" id="statLow">0</div></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <h2>Accountability</h2>
    <p class="muted">Every sale is stamped with the agent, the truck, and the time. Route sales roll up per agent; warehouse walk-ins are kept separate.</p>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <div id="recentActivity"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card" id="newDayCard">
    <h2>Start a new day</h2>
    <p class="muted" style="margin-bottom:10px">Clears today's sales and truck loads for a fresh start. Your product list, prices, trucks, people, and promos stay saved. Yesterday's records are archived in the activity log.</p>
    <button class="addBtn" onclick="startNewDay()" style="background:var(--gold)">↻ Start new day (clear sales & loads)</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page hidden" id="page-sales">
    <div class="card">
    <h2>New order</h2>
    <div class="segbtn">
    <button id="segTruck" class="on" onclick="setSaleMode('truck')">Truck route sale</button>
    <button id="segWalk" onclick="setSaleMode('walkin')">Walk-in (warehouse)</button>
    </div>
    <div id="truckFields">
    <label>Truck</label>
    <select id="saleTruck" class="field" onchange="showTruckCrew()"></select>
    <div class="crew" id="crewInfo"></div>
    </div>
    <label>Store / Customer</label>
    <select id="storePicker" class="field" onchange="onStorePick()"></select>
    <input id="newStoreName" class="field hidden" style="margin-top:8px" placeholder="Type the new store / customer name">
    <label>Money received by</label>
    <select id="saleReceiver" class="field"></select>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <h2>Add products to this order</h2>
    <label>Search product</label>
    <input id="prodSearch" class="field" placeholder="Type to filter… e.g. red horse, coke" oninput="filterProducts()">
    <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px">
    <div><label>Product</label><select id="saleProduct" class="field" onchange="showSalePromo()"></select></div>
    <div><label>Cases</label><input id="saleQty" class="field" type="number" inputmode="numeric" min="1" placeholder="0" oninput="showSalePromo()"></div>
    </div>
    <div id="prodDetails"></div>
    <div id="salePromoBanner"></div>
    <button class="addBtn" onclick="addToCart()">Add to order</button>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <h2>Current order <span id="cartStoreName" class="muted"></span></h2>
    <div id="oldBalanceBanner"></div>
    <div id="cartList"><div class="empty">No items added yet.</div></div>
    <div id="cartTotalRow" class="hidden" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:12px;padding-top:12px;border-top:2px solid var(--line)">
    <b>Order total</b><b class="amount" id="cartTotal">₱0</b>
    </div>
    <div id="payArea" class="hidden" style="margin-top:14px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--line)">
    <label style="margin-bottom:8px">How did the store pay?</label>
    <div class="segbtn">
    <button id="payFullBtn" class="on" onclick="setPayMode('full')">Paid in full</button>
    <button id="payPartialBtn" onclick="setPayMode('partial')">Partial</button>
    </div>
    <div id="partialFields" class="hidden" style="margin-top:8px">
    <label>Amount paid now (₱)</label>
    <input id="paidNow" class="field" type="number" inputmode="numeric" min="0" placeholder="e.g. 500" oninput="showPaySummary()">
    <div id="paySummary" style="margin-top:8px"></div>
    </div>
    <div id="collectArea" class="hidden" style="margin-top:12px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px dashed var(--line)">
    <label>Also collect for OLD balance (₱) <span class="muted">optional</span></label>
    <input id="collectOld" class="field" type="number" inputmode="numeric" min="0" placeholder="0" oninput="showPaySummary()">
    </div>
    </div>
    <button class="addBtn" id="completeBtn" onclick="completeOrder()" style="background:var(--gold);display:none">✓ Complete order (OK)</button>
    <button class="btn ghost small" id="cancelCartBtn" onclick="cancelCart()" style="display:none;margin-top:8px;width:100%">Cancel this order</button>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <h2>Today's completed sales</h2>
    <p class="muted" style="margin-bottom:6px">Completed orders are locked for accountability.</p>
    <div id="salesList"><div class="empty">No sales recorded yet today.</div></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page hidden" id="page-mysales">
    <div class="card">
    <h2>My sales today <span id="mySalesName" class="muted"></span></h2>
    <p class="muted" style="margin-bottom:6px">This shows only your own route sales. The business totals are private to the owner.</p>
    <div class="statGrid" style="margin:10px 0">
    <div class="stat"><div class="lbl">My sales today (₱)</div><div class="val" id="myStatSales">0</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="lbl">My orders</div><div class="val" id="myStatOrders">0</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <div id="mySalesList"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page hidden" id="page-agents">
    <div class="card">
    <h2>Agent sales report — today</h2>
    <p class="muted" style="margin-bottom:6px">Every store and customer handled by each agent. All sales are covered under the agent responsible.</p>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <div id="agentReport"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <h2>Walk-in customers — today</h2>
    <p class="muted" style="margin-bottom:6px">Warehouse sales, kept separate from truck routes.</p>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <div id="walkinReport"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page hidden" id="page-collect">
    <div class="card">
    <h2>Collectibles <span id="collectScopeName" class="muted"></span></h2>
    <p class="muted" style="margin-bottom:6px">Unpaid balances (utang) per store. Each balance follows the agent whose route the store is on. To collect a payment, start a new order for that store on the Sales tab — the old balance shows there.</p>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <div id="collectList"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page hidden" id="page-loading">
    <div class="card">
    <h2>Truck loading & return</h2>
    <p class="muted" style="margin-bottom:10px">Before leaving: record cases loaded (pulls from warehouse). After the route: record cases returned (goes back to warehouse). The balance shows what was sold.</p>
    <label>Truck</label>
    <select id="loadTruck" class="field" onchange="renderLoading()"></select>
    <div class="crew" id="loadCrew"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="segbtn">
    <button id="loadModeLoad" class="on" onclick="setLoadMode('load')">Load (leaving)</button>
    <button id="loadModeReturn" onclick="setLoadMode('return')">Return (back)</button>
    </div>
    <div id="loadFormArea">
    <label>Product</label>
    <select id="loadProduct" class="field"></select>
    <label id="loadQtyLabel">Cases to load</label>
    <input id="loadQty" class="field" type="number" inputmode="numeric" min="1" placeholder="0">
    <button class="addBtn" id="loadActionBtn" onclick="recordLoad()">Record loaded</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card" id="verifyCard">
    <h2>Load verification</h2>
    <p class="muted" style="margin-bottom:10px">The cashier checks the physical cases against what was entered, then confirms. The truck should only leave after the load is confirmed.</p>
    <div id="verifyArea"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <h2>Today's reconciliation <span id="reconTruckName" class="muted"></span></h2>
    <div id="reconTable"></div>
    <div id="reconTotals" class="hidden" style="margin-top:12px;padding-top:12px;border-top:2px solid var(--line)"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page hidden" id="page-stock">
    <div class="card">
    <h2>Stock on hand</h2>
    <p class="muted" style="margin-bottom:12px">Tap a product to add delivered stock. Selling reduces it automatically.</p>
    <div id="stockList"></div>
    <button class="btn ghost small" onclick="add20Blanks()" style="width:100%;margin-top:10px">＋ Add 20 blank product slots to fill in</button>
    </div>
    <div class="card" id="addProductCard">
    <h2>Add a new product</h2>
    <p class="muted" style="margin-bottom:10px">Add one product at a time, or use the "20 blank slots" button above to fill many quickly.</p>
    <label>Product name</label>
    <input id="npName" class="field" placeholder="e.g. Red Horse Mucho 1L">
    <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px">
    <div><label>Price per case (₱)</label><input id="npPrice" class="field" type="number" inputmode="numeric" min="0" placeholder="e.g. 960"></div>
    <div><label>Starting stock (cases)</label><input id="npStock" class="field" type="number" inputmode="numeric" min="0" placeholder="e.g. 50"></div>
    </div>
    <button class="addBtn" onclick="addProduct()">Add product</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page hidden" id="page-promos">
    <div class="card">
    <h2>Active promos</h2>
    <p class="muted" style="margin-bottom:6px">Special-occasion discounts and freebies. Everyone can see these; only the owner sets them.</p>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <div id="promoList"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card" id="addPromoCard">
    <div class="warn" id="promoOwnerWarn">Only the owner (Kap Janz) can create or change promos.</div>
    <h2>Set a promo</h2>
    <label>Product</label>
    <select id="promoProduct" class="field"></select>
    <div class="segbtn" style="margin-top:10px">
    <button id="promoTypeDisc" class="on" onclick="setPromoType('discount')">₱ Discount</button>
    <button id="promoTypeFree" onclick="setPromoType('freebie')">Freebie</button>
    </div>
    <div id="promoDiscFields">
    <label>Discount per case (₱ off)</label>
    <input id="promoAmount" class="field" type="number" inputmode="numeric" min="0" placeholder="e.g. 50">
    </div>
    <div id="promoFreeFields" class="hidden">
    <div class="row">
    <div><label>Buy how many cases</label><input id="promoBuy" class="field" type="number" inputmode="numeric" min="1" placeholder="e.g. 10"></div>
    <div><label>Get free cases</label><input id="promoGet" class="field" type="number" inputmode="numeric" min="1" placeholder="e.g. 1"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <label>Occasion / note (optional)</label>
    <input id="promoNote" class="field" placeholder="e.g. Fiesta week, ends Sunday">
    <button class="addBtn" onclick="addPromo()">Save promo</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page hidden" id="page-log">
    <div class="card">
    <h2>Activity log</h2>
    <p class="muted" style="margin-bottom:6px">Newest first — who did what, and when.</p>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <div id="fullLog"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page hidden" id="page-trucks">
    <div class="warn">Only the owner (Kap Janz) can add or edit trucks and crews.</div>
    <div class="card">
    <h2>Add / edit a truck</h2>
    <label>Truck name / number</label>
    <input id="tName" class="field" placeholder="e.g. Truck 1">
    <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px">
    <div><label>Driver</label><input id="tDriver" class="field" placeholder="Driver name"></div>
    <div><label>Agent</label><input id="tAgent" class="field" placeholder="Agent name"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px">
    <div><label>Assistant</label><input id="tAssistant" class="field" placeholder="Assistant name"></div>
    <div><label>Route / area</label><input id="tRoute" class="field" placeholder="Type the route / area"></div>
    </div>
    <button class="addBtn" onclick="saveTruck()">Save truck</button>
    <div class="subline" id="editHint" style="margin-top:8px"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <h2>Trucks & crews</h2>
    <div id="trucksList"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page hidden" id="page-people">
    <div class="warn">Only the owner (Kap Janz) can add or remove who is allowed to log in. <b>Tip:</b> Change the sample PINs (1111 / 2222 / 3333) to your own secret PINs using "Change PIN" below.</div>
    <div class="card">
    <h2>Add a person</h2>
    <label>Name</label>
    <input id="newName" class="field" placeholder="e.g. Rey (Agent)">
    <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px">
    <div><label>Role</label>
    <select id="newRole" class="field" onchange="onRoleChange()"><option value="staff">Staff (cashier)</option><option value="agent">Agent (route)</option><option value="owner">Owner</option></select>
    </div>
    <div><label>4-digit PIN</label><input id="newPin" class="field" type="text" inputmode="numeric" maxlength="6" placeholder="e.g. 3333"></div>
    </div>
    <div id="agentLinkWrap" class="hidden" style="margin-top:4px">
    <label>Which truck's agent is this? (their sales tie to this)</label>
    <select id="newAgentTruck" class="field"></select>
    </div>
    <button class="addBtn" onclick="addPerson()">Add person</button>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <h2>Current people</h2>
    <div id="peopleList"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="toast" id="toast"></div>
    <script>
    // ================== JOMAYALE CLOUD (Supabase) ==================
    const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://ppdppnpwgfsazejokvrw.supabase.co';
    const SUPABASE_KEY = 'sb_publishable_WSAM4V3zicPImYDZQ3GJaQ_6oo_Own9';
    const sb = supabase.createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_KEY);
    // In-memory data (loaded from cloud at startup, kept in sync)
    let people=[], products=[], trucks=[], sales=[], activity=[], promos=[], stores=[], loads=[], verifications=[];
    let current = null;
    let saleMode = 'truck';
    let editingTruck = -1;
    let promoType = 'discount';
    let cart = [];
    let cartStore = '';
    let loadMode = 'load';
    let payMode = 'full';
    let cloudReady = false;
    let syncing = false;
    // Map DB rows (snake_case) -> app objects (camelCase) and back
    function rowsToProducts(r){ return r.map(x=>({id:x.id, code:x.code, price:Number(x.price), stock:Number(x.stock)})); }
    function rowsToPeople(r){ return r.map(x=>({id:x.id, name:x.name, role:x.role, pin:x.pin, agentName:x.agent_name||undefined})); }
    function rowsToTrucks(r){ return r.map(x=>({id:x.id, name:x.name, driver:x.driver||'', agent:x.agent||'', assistant:x.assistant||'', route:x.route||''})); }
    function rowsToLoads(r){ return r.map(x=>({id:x.id, truck:x.truck, day:x.day, product:x.product, loaded:Number(x.loaded), returned:Number(x.returned)})); }
    function rowsToVerif(r){ return r.map(x=>({id:x.id, truck:x.truck, day:x.day, by:x.verified_by, time:x.verified_at})); }
    function rowsToStores(r){ return r.map(x=>x.name); }
    function rowsToActivity(r){ return r.map(x=>({id:x.id, who:x.who, action:x.action, time:x.time_str, day:x.day})); }
    function rowsToPromos(r){ return r.map(x=>({id:x.id, product:x.product, type:x.kind, amount:Number(x.amount), buy:Number(x.buy), get:Number(x.get), note:x.note||''})); }
    function rowsToSales(r){ return r.map(x=>({id:x.id, orderId:x.order_id, type:x.type, store:x.store, product:x.product,
    qty:Number(x.qty), freeCases:Number(x.free_cases), amount:Number(x.amount), unitPrice:Number(x.unit_price),
    truck:x.truck, agent:x.agent, receiver:x.receiver, promo:x.promo, by:x.by_name, time:x.time_str, day:x.day,
    orderTotal:Number(x.order_total), paid:Number(x.paid), balance:Number(x.balance), collectedOld:Number(x.collected_old),
    archived:!!x.archived})); }
    // Load everything from the cloud into memory
    async function loadAll(){
    const [p,pr,tr,ld,vf,st,ac,pm,sl] = await Promise.all([
    sb.from('people').select('*').order('id'),
    sb.from('products').select('*').order('id'),
    sb.from('trucks').select('*').order('id'),
    sb.from('loads').select('*').order('id'),
    sb.from('verifications').select('*').order('id'),
    sb.from('stores').select('*').order('id'),
    sb.from('activity').select('*').order('id',{ascending:false}).limit(300),
    sb.from('promos').select('*').order('id'),
    sb.from('sales').select('*').order('id',{ascending:false})
    ]);
    // Diagnostics — visible in browser console (F12)
    console.log('JOMAYALE load:', {
    people: p.error? 'ERR:'+p.error.message : (p.data?.length+' rows'),
    products: pr.error? 'ERR:'+pr.error.message : (pr.data?.length+' rows'),
    trucks: tr.error? 'ERR:'+tr.error.message : (tr.data?.length+' rows'),
    sales: sl.error? 'ERR:'+sl.error.message : (sl.data?.length+' rows')
    });
    if(p.data) people=rowsToPeople(p.data);
    if(pr.data) products=rowsToProducts(pr.data);
    if(tr.data) trucks=rowsToTrucks(tr.data);
    if(ld.data) loads=rowsToLoads(ld.data);
    if(vf.data) verifications=rowsToVerif(vf.data);
    if(st.data) stores=rowsToStores(st.data);
    if(ac.data) activity=rowsToActivity(ac.data);
    if(pm.data) promos=rowsToPromos(pm.data);
    if(sl.data) sales=rowsToSales(sl.data);
    cloudReady=true;
    }
    // Snapshot-sync a table: replace all its rows with current in-memory data.
    // GUARD: never wipe a table to empty unless an explicit clear flag is set,
    // so a momentary empty in-memory array can't erase good cloud data.
    let allowEmptySync = {}; // e.g. {products:true} when an intentional clear happens
    async function syncTable(name){
    try{
    const arrByName={people,products,trucks,loads,verifications,stores,activity,promos,sales};
    const arr=arrByName[name];
    if(arr && arr.length===0 && !allowEmptySync[name]){
    // Refuse to blow away cloud data with an empty array unless intended
    return;
    }
    if(name==='people'){
    await sb.from('people').delete().neq('id',-1);
    if(people.length) await sb.from('people').insert(people.map(p=>({name:p.name,role:p.role,pin:p.pin,agent_name:p.agentName||null})));
    } else if(name==='products'){
    await sb.from('products').delete().neq('id',-1);
    if(products.length) await sb.from('products').insert(products.map(p=>({code:p.code,price:p.price,stock:p.stock})));
    } else if(name==='trucks'){
    await sb.from('trucks').delete().neq('id',-1);
    if(trucks.length) await sb.from('trucks').insert(trucks.map(t=>({name:t.name,driver:t.driver,agent:t.agent,assistant:t.assistant,route:t.route})));
    } else if(name==='loads'){
    await sb.from('loads').delete().neq('id',-1);
    if(loads.length) await sb.from('loads').insert(loads.map(l=>({truck:l.truck,day:l.day,product:l.product,loaded:l.loaded,returned:l.returned})));
    } else if(name==='verifications'){
    await sb.from('verifications').delete().neq('id',-1);
    if(verifications.length) await sb.from('verifications').insert(verifications.map(v=>({truck:v.truck,day:v.day,verified_by:v.by,verified_at:v.time})));
    } else if(name==='stores'){
    await sb.from('stores').delete().neq('id',-1);
    if(stores.length) await sb.from('stores').insert(stores.map(s=>({name:s})));
    } else if(name==='activity'){
    await sb.from('activity').delete().neq('id',-1);
    if(activity.length) await sb.from('activity').insert(activity.slice(0,300).map(a=>({who:a.who,action:a.action,time_str:a.time,day:a.day})));
    } else if(name==='promos'){
    await sb.from('promos').delete().neq('id',-1);
    if(promos.length) await sb.from('promos').insert(promos.map(p=>({product:p.product,kind:p.type,amount:p.amount||0,buy:p.buy||0,get:p.get||0,note:p.note||''})));
    } else if(name==='sales'){
    await sb.from('sales').delete().neq('id',-1);
    if(sales.length) await sb.from('sales').insert(sales.map(s=>({order_id:s.orderId,type:s.type,store:s.store,product:s.product,
    qty:s.qty,free_cases:s.freeCases||0,amount:s.amount,unit_price:s.unitPrice,truck:s.truck,agent:s.agent,receiver:s.receiver,
    promo:s.promo,by_name:s.by,time_str:s.time,day:s.day,order_total:s.orderTotal||0,paid:s.paid||0,balance:s.balance||0,
    collected_old:s.collectedOld||0,archived:!!s.archived})));
    }
    }catch(e){ console.error('sync '+name+' failed', e); }
    }
    // persist(name or list): push only the changed table(s) to the cloud.
    // Called with no args = sync all (used rarely). Normally pass the table name(s).
    async function persist(which){
    if(!cloudReady) return;
    let tables;
    if(!which) tables=['people','products','trucks','loads','verifications','stores','activity','promos','sales'];
    else if(Array.isArray(which)) tables=which;
    else tables=[which];
    syncing=true;
    await Promise.all(tables.map(syncTable));
    // brief window so our own realtime echo is ignored
    setTimeout(()=>{ syncing=false; }, 400);
    }
    // Realtime: when ANY table changes (from any phone), reload + redraw
    function startRealtime(){
    sb.channel('jomayale-all')
    .on('postgres_changes',{event:'*',schema:'public'}, async ()=>{
    if(syncing) return; // ignore echoes of our own writes
    await loadAll();
    if(current) renderAll();
    })
    .subscribe();
    }
    // ================================================================
    // ---- collectibles / balance helpers (per agent + store) ----
    function outstandingFor(agent, store){
    // sum of balances added minus old-balance payments collected, for this agent+store
    let bal=0;
    sales.forEach(s=>{
    if(s.type!=='truck') return;
    if(s.agent!==agent || s.store!==store) return;
    bal += (s.balance||0); // unpaid part of that order
    bal -= (s.collectedOld||0); // payments applied to old balance
    });
    return Math.max(0, Math.round(bal));
    }
    // list of {store, owed} for an agent, only those still owing
    function agentCollectibles(agent){
    const map={};
    sales.forEach(s=>{
    if(s.type!=='truck' || s.agent!==agent) return;
    if(!(s.store in map)) map[s.store]=0;
    map[s.store]+=(s.balance||0)-(s.collectedOld||0);
    });
    return Object.entries(map).map(([store,owed])=>({store,owed:Math.round(owed)}))
    .filter(o=>o.owed>0).sort((a,b)=>b.owed-a.owed);
    }
    function isLoadVerified(truckName){
    return verifications.some(v=>v.truck===truckName && v.day===todayKey());
    }
    function nowStr(){ const d=new Date(); return d.toLocaleString('en-PH',{month:'short',day:'numeric',hour:'numeric',minute:'2-digit',hour12:true}); }
    function todayKey(){ return new Date().toDateString(); }
    function peso(n){ return '₱'+Number(n).toLocaleString('en-PH'); }
    function logAction(action){ activity.unshift({ who: current? current.name : 'Unknown', action, time: nowStr(), day: todayKey() }); activity=activity.slice(0,300); persist(); }
    function toast(msg){ const t=document.getElementById('toast'); t.textContent=msg; t.classList.add('show'); setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('show'),1900); }
    function fillUserSelect(){ document.getElementById('userSelect').innerHTML = people.map(p=>`<option value="${p.name}">${p.name}</option>`).join(''); }
    async function doLogin(){
    const name=document.getElementById('userSelect').value;
    const pin=document.getElementById('pinInput').value.trim();
    const err=document.getElementById('loginErr');
    const person=people.find(p=>p.name===name);
    if(!person){ err.textContent='Please choose a user.'; return; }
    if(pin!==person.pin){ err.textContent='Wrong PIN. Try again.'; return; }
    current=person; err.textContent=''; document.getElementById('pinInput').value='';
    // Pull the latest data from the cloud so we never show a stale/empty screen
    err.textContent='Loading…';
    try{ await loadAll(); }catch(e){ console.error(e); }
    err.textContent='';
    logAction('Logged in'); showApp(); toast('Welcome, '+person.name.split(' ')[0]+'!');
    }
    function doLogout(){
    logAction('Logged out'); current=null;
    document.getElementById('appView').classList.add('hidden');
    document.getElementById('loginView').classList.remove('hidden'); fillUserSelect();
    }
    function showApp(){
    document.getElementById('loginView').classList.add('hidden');
    document.getElementById('appView').classList.remove('hidden');
    document.getElementById('currentName').textContent=current.name;
    const owner = current.role==='owner';
    const agent = current.role==='agent';
    // owner-only tabs
    document.getElementById('trucksTab').style.display = owner ? '' : 'none';
    document.getElementById('peopleTab').style.display = owner ? '' : 'none';
    // agents get a restricted set: only Sales + My Sales. Hide business-wide views.
    const hideForAgent = ['home','agents','stock','promos','log'];
    document.querySelectorAll('.tabs button').forEach(b=>{
    const t=b.dataset.tab;
    if(agent && hideForAgent.includes(t)) b.style.display='none';
    else if(!owner && (t==='trucks'||t==='people')) { /* handled above */ }
    else if(!agent && t==='mysales') b.style.display='none';
    else if(t!=='trucks' && t!=='people') b.style.display='';
    });
    // show My Sales tab only for agents
    const my=document.getElementById('mySalesTab'); if(my) my.style.display = agent ? '' : 'none';
    switchTab(agent ? 'sales' : 'home');
    }
    function switchTab(tab){
    const owner = current && current.role==='owner';
    const agent = current && current.role==='agent';
    if((tab==='people'||tab==='trucks') && !owner){ toast('Only the owner can open that'); tab='home'; }
    // agents may open sales, their own my-sales, loading, and their own collectibles
    if(agent && !['sales','mysales','loading','collect'].includes(tab)){ toast('Agents can only see their own sales, loading & collectibles'); tab='sales'; }
    document.querySelectorAll('.tabs button').forEach(b=>b.classList.toggle('active', b.dataset.tab===tab));
    document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.add('hidden'));
    const pg=document.getElementById('page-'+tab); if(pg) pg.classList.remove('hidden');
    renderAll();
    }
    function renderAll(){ fillSelects(); renderHome(); renderSales(); renderCart(); renderMySales(); renderAgents(); renderCollect(); renderLoading(); renderStock(); renderPromos(); renderLog(); renderTrucks(); renderPeople(); }
    function renderMySales(){
    const el=document.getElementById('mySalesList'); if(!el) return;
    if(!current || current.role!=='agent'){ return; }
    const myAgent=current.agentName||'';
    const nameEl=document.getElementById('mySalesName'); if(nameEl) nameEl.textContent = myAgent?('— '+myAgent):'';
    const tKey=todayKey();
    const mine=sales.filter(s=>s.day===tKey && !s.archived && s.type==='truck' && s.agent===myAgent);
    const total=mine.reduce((a,s)=>a+s.amount,0);
    // count distinct orders
    const orders=new Set(mine.map(s=>s.orderId)).size;
    const st=document.getElementById('myStatSales'); if(st) st.textContent=Number(total).toLocaleString('en-PH');
    const so=document.getElementById('myStatOrders'); if(so) so.textContent=orders;
    el.innerHTML = mine.length
    ? mine.map(s=>`<div class="listItem"><div><b>${s.store}</b>${s.freeCases?` <span class="pill promoTag">+${s.freeCases} free</span>`:''}<br><span class="muted">${s.qty} × ${s.product} · money: ${s.receiver} · ${s.time}</span></div><div class="amount">${peso(s.amount)}</div></div>`).join('')
    : '<div class="empty">No sales yet today.</div>';
    }
    /* ================= TRUCK LOADING & RECONCILIATION ================= */
    function setLoadMode(m){
    loadMode=m;
    document.getElementById('loadModeLoad').classList.toggle('on',m==='load');
    document.getElementById('loadModeReturn').classList.toggle('on',m==='return');
    document.getElementById('loadQtyLabel').textContent = m==='load' ? 'Cases to load' : 'Cases returned';
    document.getElementById('loadActionBtn').textContent = m==='load' ? 'Record loaded' : 'Record returned';
    }
    // which truck is selected on the loading screen (agents locked to their own)
    function currentLoadTruck(){
    const sel=document.getElementById('loadTruck'); if(!sel) return null;
    const i=parseInt(sel.value); return trucks[i]!==undefined? i : null;
    }
    function fillLoadSelects(){
    const sel=document.getElementById('loadTruck'); if(!sel) return;
    const agent = current && current.role==='agent';
    if(agent){
    const myIdx=trucks.findIndex(t=>t.agent===current.agentName);
    const list = myIdx>=0 ? [trucks[myIdx]] : trucks;
    sel.innerHTML=list.map(t=>`<option value="${trucks.indexOf(t)}">${t.name}${t.agent?' — '+t.agent:''}</option>`).join('');
    sel.disabled=true;
    } else {
    sel.innerHTML=trucks.map((t,i)=>`<option value="${i}">${t.name}${t.agent?' — '+t.agent:''}</option>`).join('');
    sel.disabled=false;
    }
    const lp=document.getElementById('loadProduct');
    if(lp) lp.innerHTML=products.map((p,i)=>`<option value="${i}">${p.code}</option>`).join('');
    }
    function loadKey(truckName){ return truckName+'|'+todayKey(); }
    function getLoadRow(truckName, pi){
    const prodCode = products[pi] ? products[pi].code : null;
    return loads.find(l=>l.truck===truckName && l.day===todayKey() && (l.pi===pi || (prodCode && l.product===prodCode)));
    }
    function prodIndexByCode(code){ return products.findIndex(p=>p.code===code); }
    function recordLoad(){
    if(!products.length){ toast('Add products in the Stock tab first'); return; }
    const ti=currentLoadTruck(); if(ti===null){ toast('Choose a truck'); return; }
    const t=trucks[ti];
    const pi=parseInt(document.getElementById('loadProduct').value);
    const qty=parseInt(document.getElementById('loadQty').value);
    const prod=products[pi];
    if(!prod){ toast('Choose a product'); return; }
    if(!qty||qty<1){ toast('Enter number of cases'); return; }
    let row=getLoadRow(t.name,pi);
    if(loadMode==='load'){
    if(qty>prod.stock){ toast('Not enough warehouse stock! Only '+prod.stock+' left'); return; }
    prod.stock-=qty; // pull from warehouse onto truck
    if(row){ row.loaded+=qty; } else { loads.push({truck:t.name, day:todayKey(), product:prod.code, pi, loaded:qty, returned:0}); }
    logAction(`Loaded ${qty} × ${prod.code} onto ${t.name}`);
    toast('Loaded '+qty+' × '+prod.code);
    } else {
    if(!row || row.loaded===0){ toast('Nothing loaded for that product yet'); return; }
    const maxReturn=row.loaded-row.returned;
    if(qty>maxReturn){ toast(`Can't return more than loaded. Max ${maxReturn}`); return; }
    row.returned+=qty; prod.stock+=qty; // back to warehouse
    logAction(`Returned ${qty} × ${prod.code} from ${t.name}`);
    toast('Returned '+qty+' × '+prod.code);
    }
    document.getElementById('loadQty').value='';
    persist(); renderAll();
    }
    function editLoadRow(pi){
    const ti=currentLoadTruck(); if(ti===null) return;
    const t=trucks[ti]; const row=getLoadRow(t.name,pi); if(!row) return;
    const prod=products[prodIndexByCode(row.product)] || products[row.pi] || products[pi];
    const val=prompt(`Correct LOADED cases for ${row.product} on ${t.name}:`, row.loaded);
    if(val===null) return;
    const n=parseInt(val);
    if(!(n>=0)){ toast('Enter a valid number'); return; }
    if(n<row.returned){ toast('Loaded cannot be less than already returned ('+row.returned+')'); return; }
    const diff=n-row.loaded; // positive means more onto truck (pull from warehouse)
    if(prod && diff>0 && diff>prod.stock){ toast('Not enough warehouse stock for the increase. Only '+prod.stock+' left'); return; }
    if(prod) prod.stock-=diff; // if diff negative, adds back to warehouse
    row.loaded=n;
    logAction(`Edited load: ${row.product} on ${t.name} → ${n} loaded`);
    persist(); renderAll(); toast('Load updated');
    }
    function editReturnRow(pi){
    const ti=currentLoadTruck(); if(ti===null) return;
    const t=trucks[ti]; const row=getLoadRow(t.name,pi); if(!row) return;
    const prod=products[prodIndexByCode(row.product)] || products[row.pi] || products[pi];
    const val=prompt(`Correct RETURNED cases for ${row.product} on ${t.name}:`, row.returned);
    if(val===null) return;
    const n=parseInt(val);
    if(!(n>=0)){ toast('Enter a valid number'); return; }
    if(n>row.loaded){ toast('Returned cannot exceed loaded ('+row.loaded+')'); return; }
    const diff=n-row.returned; // positive means more back to warehouse
    if(prod) prod.stock+=diff;
    row.returned=n;
    logAction(`Edited return: ${row.product} on ${t.name} → ${n} returned`);
    persist(); renderAll(); toast('Return updated');
    }
    function renderVerify(t){
    const el=document.getElementById('verifyArea'); if(!el) return;
    const rows=loads.filter(l=>l.truck===t.name && l.day===todayKey());
    const verified=isLoadVerified(t.name);
    const v=verifications.find(x=>x.truck===t.name && x.day===todayKey());
    const isCashierOrOwner = current && (current.role==='staff' || current.role==='owner');
    if(!rows.length){
    el.innerHTML='<div class="empty">Nothing loaded yet for this truck today.</div>';
    return;
    }
    const totalCases=rows.reduce((a,r)=>a+r.loaded,0);
    let html=`<div style="margin-bottom:10px">Loaded so far: <b>${totalCases} case(s)</b> across ${rows.length} product(s).</div>`;
    if(verified){
    html+=`<div class="pill ok" style="padding:10px 12px">✓ Load confirmed by ${v.by} · ${v.time}</div>`;
    if(isCashierOrOwner){
    html+=`<button class="btn ghost small" style="margin-top:10px" onclick="unverifyLoad('${t.name.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}')">Undo confirmation (correction needed)</button>`;
    }
    } else {
    html+=`<div class="warn" style="margin-bottom:10px">Not confirmed yet. Truck should not leave until the cashier checks the physical cases against the numbers above.</div>`;
    if(isCashierOrOwner){
    html+=`<button class="addBtn" onclick="verifyLoad('${t.name.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}')">✓ Cashier: confirm load matches</button>`;
    } else {
    html+=`<div class="muted" style="font-size:13px">Waiting for the cashier to confirm.</div>`;
    }
    }
    el.innerHTML=html;
    }
    function verifyLoad(truckName){
    if(!(current && (current.role==='staff'||current.role==='owner'))){ toast('Only the cashier or owner can confirm'); return; }
    if(isLoadVerified(truckName)){ toast('Already confirmed'); return; }
    verifications.push({truck:truckName, day:todayKey(), by:current.name, time:nowStr()});
    logAction(`Confirmed the load for ${truckName}`);
    persist(); renderAll(); toast('Load confirmed for '+truckName);
    }
    function unverifyLoad(truckName){
    if(!(current && (current.role==='staff'||current.role==='owner'))){ toast('Only the cashier or owner can undo'); return; }
    verifications = verifications.filter(v=>!(v.truck===truckName && v.day===todayKey()));
    logAction(`Undid load confirmation for ${truckName}`);
    persist(); renderAll(); toast('Confirmation removed — cashier can re-check');
    }
    function renderLoading(){
    fillLoadSelects();
    const crewEl=document.getElementById('loadCrew');
    const ti=currentLoadTruck();
    if(ti===null){ if(crewEl) crewEl.textContent=''; return; }
    const t=trucks[ti];
    if(crewEl) crewEl.innerHTML=`Agent: <b>${t.agent||'—'}</b> · Driver: <b>${t.driver||'—'}</b> · Assistant: <b>${t.assistant||'—'}</b>${t.route?' · Route: '+t.route:''}`;
    document.getElementById('reconTruckName').textContent='— '+t.name;
    renderVerify(t);
    // rows for this truck today
    const rows=loads.filter(l=>l.truck===t.name && l.day===todayKey());
    const tbl=document.getElementById('reconTable');
    const totalsEl=document.getElementById('reconTotals');
    if(!rows.length){
    tbl.innerHTML='<div class="empty">No stock loaded for this truck today yet.</div>';
    totalsEl.classList.add('hidden'); return;
    }
    // sold per product for this truck's agent today (from sales)
    const tKey=todayKey();
    function soldCases(prodCode){
    return sales.filter(s=>s.day===tKey && !s.archived && s.type==='truck' && s.truck===t.name && s.product===prodCode)
    .reduce((a,s)=>a+s.qty+(s.freeCases||0),0);
    }
    let totLoaded=0,totReturned=0,totSold=0,totExpectedSold=0,pesoSales=0;
    let html=`<div class="listItem" style="font-weight:700;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted)">
    <div style="flex:2">Product</div><div style="flex:1;text-align:center">Load</div>
    <div style="flex:1;text-align:center">Ret</div><div style="flex:1;text-align:center">Bal=Sold</div>
    <div style="flex:1;text-align:center">Actual</div></div>`;
    rows.forEach(r=>{
    const balance=r.loaded-r.returned; // what should have been sold
    const actual=soldCases(r.product); // what sales recorded
    const match = balance===actual;
    const rpi = (typeof r.pi==='number' && products[r.pi] && products[r.pi].code===r.product) ? r.pi : prodIndexByCode(r.product);
    totLoaded+=r.loaded; totReturned+=r.returned; totSold+=actual; totExpectedSold+=balance;
    html+=`<div class="listItem">
    <div style="flex:2"><b>${r.product}</b>
    <div style="margin-top:4px;display:flex;gap:6px">
    <button class="btn small ghost" onclick="editLoadRow(${rpi})">Edit load</button>
    <button class="btn small ghost" onclick="editReturnRow(${rpi})">Edit ret</button>
    </div></div>
    <div style="flex:1;text-align:center">${r.loaded}</div>
    <div style="flex:1;text-align:center">${r.returned}</div>
    <div style="flex:1;text-align:center"><b>${balance}</b></div>
    <div style="flex:1;text-align:center">${match?`<span class="pill ok">${actual}</span>`:`<span class="pill low">${actual}</span>`}</div>
    </div>`;
    });
    tbl.innerHTML=html;
    // peso value of actual sales for this truck today
    const todayTruckSales = sales.filter(s=>s.day===tKey && !s.archived && s.type==='truck' && s.truck===t.name);
    pesoSales = todayTruckSales.reduce((a,s)=>a+s.amount,0);
    const cashFromSales = todayTruckSales.reduce((a,s)=>a+(s.paid||0),0); // paid on today's orders
    const newBalances = todayTruckSales.reduce((a,s)=>a+(s.balance||0),0); // utang added today
    const oldCollected = todayTruckSales.reduce((a,s)=>a+(s.collectedOld||0),0); // old utang paid today
    const totalCash = cashFromSales + oldCollected; // money the agent should hand in
    const shortage = totExpectedSold - totSold; // >0 means cases missing (loaded-returned exceeds sales)
    // agent's total outstanding across ALL days for this truck's agent
    const agentName = t.agent||'(no agent set)';
    const totalOutstanding = agentCollectibles(agentName).reduce((a,o)=>a+o.owed,0);
    totalsEl.classList.remove('hidden');
    totalsEl.innerHTML=`
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:14px"><span>Total loaded</span><b>${totLoaded} cases</b></div>
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:14px"><span>Total returned</span><b>${totReturned} cases</b></div>
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:14px"><span>Balance (should be sold)</span><b>${totExpectedSold} cases</b></div>
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:14px"><span>Actual recorded sales</span><b>${totSold} cases</b></div>
    <div style="margin-top:8px">${
    shortage===0 ? `<div class="pill ok" style="padding:8px 12px">✓ Cases balanced — sold matches loaded minus returned</div>`
    : shortage>0 ? `<div class="pill low" style="padding:8px 12px">⚠ Shortage: ${shortage} case(s) unaccounted (loaded−returned is more than recorded sales)</div>`
    : `<div class="pill low" style="padding:8px 12px">⚠ Over: ${Math.abs(shortage)} case(s) sold beyond loaded−returned — check loading entry</div>`
    }</div>
    <div style="margin-top:12px;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px solid var(--line)">
    <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:6px">MONEY</div>
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:14px"><span>Route sales value (goods)</span><b class="amount">${peso(pesoSales)}</b></div>
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:14px"><span>Cash from today's sales</span><b class="amount">${peso(cashFromSales)}</b></div>
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:14px"><span>Old balance collected</span><b class="amount">${peso(oldCollected)}</b></div>
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:15px;margin-top:4px;padding-top:6px;border-top:1px dashed var(--line)">
    <span><b>Cash agent should hand in</b></span><b class="amount" style="color:var(--brand)">${peso(totalCash)}</b></div>
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:14px;margin-top:6px"><span>New balances added today</span><b class="amount" style="color:var(--danger)">${peso(newBalances)}</b></div>
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:14px"><span>${agentName}'s total collectibles</span><b class="amount" style="color:var(--danger)">${peso(totalOutstanding)}</b></div>
    </div>`;
    }
    function fillSelects(){
    const ps=document.getElementById('saleProduct');
    if(ps){
    const q=(document.getElementById('prodSearch')?.value||'').toLowerCase().trim();
    const cur=ps.value;
    const matches=products.map((p,i)=>({p,i})).filter(o=>!q||o.p.code.toLowerCase().includes(q));
    const list=matches.length?matches:products.map((p,i)=>({p,i}));
    ps.innerHTML=list.map(o=>`<option value="${o.i}">${o.p.code} — ${peso(o.p.price)}</option>`).join('');
    if([...ps.options].some(o=>o.value===cur)) ps.value=cur;
    }
    const ts=document.getElementById('saleTruck');
    const agent = current && current.role==='agent';
    if(ts){
    if(agent){
    // agent only sees their own truck, and it's locked
    const myIdx=trucks.findIndex(t=>t.agent===current.agentName);
    const list = myIdx>=0 ? [trucks[myIdx]] : trucks;
    ts.innerHTML=list.map(t=>`<option value="${trucks.indexOf(t)}">${t.name}${t.agent?' — '+t.agent:''}</option>`).join('');
    ts.disabled=true;
    } else {
    ts.innerHTML=trucks.map((t,i)=>`<option value="${i}">${t.name}${t.agent?' — '+t.agent:''}</option>`).join('');
    ts.disabled=false;
    }
    }
    const rc=document.getElementById('saleReceiver');
    if(rc){
    if(agent){
    // agent receives their own money by default; still selectable among people if needed, but default to self
    rc.innerHTML=people.map(p=>`<option value="${p.name}"${p.name===current.name?' selected':''}>${p.name}</option>`).join('');
    } else {
    rc.innerHTML=people.map(p=>`<option value="${p.name}">${p.name}</option>`).join('');
    }
    }
    const pp=document.getElementById('promoProduct');
    if(pp) pp.innerHTML=products.map((p,i)=>`<option value="${i}">${p.code}</option>`).join('');
    fillStorePicker();
    showTruckCrew(); showSalePromo();
    }
    function fillStorePicker(){
    const sp=document.getElementById('storePicker'); if(!sp) return;
    const saved=[...stores].sort((a,b)=>a.localeCompare(b));
    sp.innerHTML = `<option value="">— Choose a saved store —</option>`
    + saved.map(s=>`<option value="${s.replace(/"/g,'&quot;')}">${s}</option>`).join('')
    + `<option value="__new__">＋ Add a new store / customer</option>`;
    }
    function onStorePick(){
    const sp=document.getElementById('storePicker');
    const inp=document.getElementById('newStoreName');
    if(sp.value==='__new__'){ inp.classList.remove('hidden'); inp.focus(); }
    else { inp.classList.add('hidden'); inp.value=''; }
    }
    // find an active promo for a product name
    function findPromo(productCode){ return promos.find(pr=>pr.product===productCode); }
    function filterProducts(){
    const q=(document.getElementById('prodSearch').value||'').toLowerCase().trim();
    const sel=document.getElementById('saleProduct'); if(!sel) return;
    const matches=products.map((p,i)=>({p,i})).filter(o=>!q || o.p.code.toLowerCase().includes(q));
    const list = matches.length?matches:products.map((p,i)=>({p,i}));
    sel.innerHTML=list.map(o=>`<option value="${o.i}">${o.p.code} — ${peso(o.p.price)}</option>`).join('');
    showSalePromo();
    }
    function showSalePromo(){
    const el=document.getElementById('salePromoBanner');
    const det=document.getElementById('prodDetails');
    const pi=parseInt(document.getElementById('saleProduct').value);
    const prod=products[pi];
    // product details panel — full info from Stock
    if(det){
    if(!prod){ det.innerHTML=''; }
    else {
    det.innerHTML=`<div class="promoBanner" style="background:var(--soft);border-color:var(--line);color:var(--ink)">
    <b>${prod.code}</b><br>
    <span class="muted">Price: ${peso(prod.price)}/case</span>
    </div>`;
    }
    }
    if(!el) return;
    if(!prod){ el.innerHTML=''; return; }
    const promo=findPromo(prod.code);
    if(!promo){ el.innerHTML=''; return; }
    const qty=parseInt(document.getElementById('saleQty').value)||0;
    if(promo.kind==='discount'){
    const per=promo.amount;
    const newPrice=Math.max(0,prod.price-per);
    let msg=`<b>Promo:</b> ${peso(per)} off per case → now ${peso(newPrice)}/case`;
    if(qty>0) msg+=` · you save ${peso(per*qty)}`;
    if(promo.note) msg+=`<br><span class="muted">${promo.note}</span>`;
    el.innerHTML=`<div class="promoBanner">${msg}</div>`;
    } else {
    let msg=`<b>Promo:</b> Buy ${promo.buy} get ${promo.get} free`;
    if(qty>=promo.buy){ const free=Math.floor(qty/promo.buy)*promo.get; msg+=` · you get <b>${free}</b> free case(s)`; }
    if(promo.note) msg+=`<br><span class="muted">${promo.note}</span>`;
    el.innerHTML=`<div class="promoBanner">${msg}</div>`;
    }
    }
    function showTruckCrew(){
    const el=document.getElementById('crewInfo'); if(!el) return;
    const i=parseInt(document.getElementById('saleTruck').value); const t=trucks[i];
    if(!t){ el.textContent=''; return; }
    el.innerHTML = `Agent: <b>${t.agent||'—'}</b> · Driver: <b>${t.driver||'—'}</b> · Assistant: <b>${t.assistant||'—'}</b>${t.route?' · Route: '+t.route:''}`;
    }
    function setSaleMode(m){
    if(cart.length){ if(!confirm('Switching will clear the current unsaved order. Continue?')){ return; } }
    saleMode=m; cart=[]; cartStore='';
    document.getElementById('segTruck').classList.toggle('on',m==='truck');
    document.getElementById('segWalk').classList.toggle('on',m==='walkin');
    document.getElementById('truckFields').classList.toggle('hidden',m!=='truck');
    document.getElementById('storePicker').value='';
    document.getElementById('newStoreName').classList.add('hidden');
    document.getElementById('newStoreName').value='';
    renderCart();
    }
    function renderHome(){
    const tKey=todayKey();
    const todaySales=sales.filter(s=>s.day===tKey && !s.archived);
    const total=todaySales.reduce((a,s)=>a+s.amount,0);
    const walk=todaySales.filter(s=>s.type==='walkin').reduce((a,s)=>a+s.amount,0);
    document.getElementById('statSales').textContent=Number(total).toLocaleString('en-PH');
    document.getElementById('statTxns').textContent=todaySales.length;
    document.getElementById('statWalk').textContent=Number(walk).toLocaleString('en-PH');
    document.getElementById('statLow').textContent=products.filter(p=>p.stock<=10).length;
    const recent=activity.slice(0,5);
    document.getElementById('recentActivity').innerHTML = recent.length
    ? recent.map(a=>`<div class="logRow"><b>${a.who}</b> — ${a.action}<div class="t">${a.time}</div></div>`).join('')
    : '<div class="empty">No activity yet.</div>';
    // new-day card only for owner
    const ndc=document.getElementById('newDayCard');
    if(ndc) ndc.style.display = (current && current.role==='owner') ? '' : 'none';
    }
    function startNewDay(){
    if(!current || current.role!=='owner'){ toast('Only the owner can start a new day'); return; }
    const tKey=todayKey();
    const todaySalesCount=sales.filter(s=>s.day===tKey).length;
    const todayLoadsCount=loads.filter(l=>l.day===tKey).length;
    if(!confirm(`Start a new day?\n\nThis clears today's ${todaySalesCount} sale(s) and ${todayLoadsCount} truck load record(s). Any unsold cases still on trucks will be returned to the warehouse.\n\nProducts, prices, trucks, people, and promos are kept.`)) return;
    // return any un-returned loaded cases back to warehouse so stock stays correct
    let returnedBack=0;
    View remainder of file in raw view
